title: Xaero's Horrors - Minimap Icons for Cave Dwellers & More
description: For When Have To Tell The Difference Between One Red Dot And Another
body:
![Resource Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33a5026559f0d524361215604ae2167d7fe24b6a.png)

### **Gradually Adding Xaero's Minimap Support For Horror Mods** 

⚠️ _Also trigger warning for bits of simulated blood_ ⚠️

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CuucaWZZngM](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CuucaWZZngM)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/CuucaWZZngM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
 
## Currently Supports

**THE CAVE DWELLER REIMAGINED** (Includes "Cavenoise Overhaul" Cave Dweller)

**NIGHTMARE.JAR** (Alternative Pack Download)

**CREATION.JAR**

**THE GOATMAN**

**THE MAN FROM THE FOG**

**THE CHRISTMAS DWELLER**

**SANITY: DESCENT INTO MADNESS**

**THERE IS SOMETHING IN THE CAVES**

**THE ONE WHO WATCHES**

**THE CORPSE STALKER**



## Planned Support

**EYES IN THE DARKNESS**

**THE SKINSTALKER**

**CHOO-CHOO** (Gurka20 version)

**THE DEMONIC WATCHER**

**CAVE DWELLER EXTREME**

**LETHAL CAVE DWELLERS**

**DWELLER DWELLER** (?)

**SPIDER MOTH DWELLER BOSS**

**CHEST MIMICS** (?)

**WEEPING ANGELS**

**THE CREATION** (Notelekz Version)

**THE DEEP DWELLER** (Not Yet Released)
 

Made Exclusively for **Xaero's Minimap** and **Xaero's World Map**
